name: Relay Minimum Gate
purpose: Run the focused governed relay Contract proof without importing provisional or opaque implementations.

oracle.description: The focused relay proof exits zero only when the injected delivery envelope and acknowledgement preserve the exact correlation id.

rejects: relay dropping or replacing the request correlation id
relay altering the bounded request payload before invoking the injected delivery port

residualUncertainty: The proof uses an injected fake delivery port and does not exercise a real device.
The reference demonstrates compiled scope and Contract discipline, not operating-system read enforcement.
